title: Binance Risk Assessment
description: Binance smart risk assessment skill for position sizing and risk management. Analyzes volatility, funding rates, liquidation distance, and provides composite risk scores with actionable recommendations.

binance_risk_assess_position.title: Assess Position Risk
binance_risk_assess_position.description: Assess the risk of a Binance Futures position. Analyzes volatility, funding rate impact, liquidation distance, and returns a composite risk score (0-100) with recommendations.

binance_risk_calculate_size.title: Calculate Position Size
binance_risk_calculate_size.description: Calculate optimal position size using fixed-percentage risk model. Takes account balance, risk tolerance, leverage, and stop loss to determine safe position sizing. Auto-suggests stop loss from ATR if not provided.

states.description: States for each Binance Risk Assessment skill (disabled, public, or private)
